Methodology

Data source: Hospital General Information (dataset ID: xubh-q36u). Vintage: 2026. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 5,426.

Additional data sources: Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program (FY2026) Hospital Value-Based Purchasing TPS (FY2026)
